# Heavy Tabs

> Free online guitar, bass, and drum tablature editor

Heavy Tabs is a browser-based tab editor for writing guitar, bass, and drum tablature. No download or account required to start writing.

## Features

- Write guitar tabs with 6, 7, or 8 strings
- Write bass tabs with 4, 5, or 6 strings
- Write drum tabs with a 10-line kit (crash, ride, hi-hats, toms, snare, kick)
- Standard and drop tunings with transposition by key
- Instant audio playback with click track and loop mode
- Techniques: hammer-on, pull-off, slide, bend, vibrato, palm mute
- Power chord mode for fast riff entry
- Palm mute annotation spans
- Chord library with all major and minor chords
- Undo/redo, copy/paste, keyboard shortcuts
- Cloud sync across devices (free with account)
- Share tabs via public link
- Print / export to PDF
- Works offline via localStorage
- Dark theme

## URL

https://heavytabs.app

## Pricing

- Free: up to 10 projects
- Pro: $10 one-time payment for unlimited projects
